title: Full-Stack Analytics SaaS
summary: Built an analytics dashboard with event ingestion, cohort analysis, and feature usage insights for product teams.
description: A comprehensive product analytics platform designed for SaaS companies to understand user behavior at every stage of the customer journey. The system captures granular event data, processes it in real-time, and presents actionable insights through intuitive visualizations. Key features include automatic session stitching across devices, funnel analysis with drop-off diagnostics, cohort retention curves, and feature adoption tracking with A/B test integration.
challenge: The product team lacked visibility into how users interacted with their application after signup. Existing analytics tools were either too expensive at scale or too limited in their cohort analysis capabilities. They needed to understand why trial users weren't converting and which features drove long-term retention.
solution: Developed a custom analytics platform using SolidJS for blazing-fast dashboard interactions and PostgreSQL with TimescaleDB extensions for efficient time-series data storage. The event ingestion pipeline handles 50K+ events per minute with automatic batching and compression. Built-in cohort analysis allows slicing users by any combination of properties, behaviors, or time periods.
impact: Improved visibility into activation bottlenecks and increased trial-to-paid conversion by 23%. Product team reduced time-to-insight from days to minutes. Identified three critical UX friction points that, once resolved, improved Day-7 retention by 18%.
